hooks.command: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d /tmp/mp-stop-XXXXXX) && cat > "$tmpdir/session.jsonl" && mempalace mine "$tmpdir" --mode convos 2>/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmpdir"
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d /tmp/mp-compact-XXXXXX) && cat > "$tmpdir/session.jsonl" && mempalace mine "$tmpdir" --mode convos 2>/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmpdir"
